sourcesContent:
import BgMusic from './bgMusic'
import Countdown from './countdown'
import IntroSlide from './introSlide'
import LastSlide from './lastSlide'
import Location from './location'

function Layout() {
    return (
        <>
            <BgMusic />
            <IntroSlide />
            <Countdown />
            <Location />
            <LastSlide />
        </>
    )
}

export default Layout
